sections.heading: Welcome
sections.content: VibeScholar is an opinionated research-operations platform that helps you plan, execute, and track AI/ML research projects from idea to publication. This project is your interactive tutorial.

sections.heading: What is VibeScholar?
sections.content:
VibeScholar organizes every research project into five pillars:

1. **Overview** — Structured project definition with motivation, scope, questions, and risks
2. **Execution** — Phased Vibe Coding (VC) and Vibe Research (VR) steps with AI prompts and acceptance criteria
3. **Timeline** — Milestone-based tracking with Kanban view and deadline management
4. **Artifacts** — Registry of code, datasets, figures, tables, and reports linked to milestones
5. **Literature** — Imported papers with tags, summaries, and normalized metadata

steps.label: Explore the Dashboard
steps.description: Open the project list to see all demo projects across 16 research domains. Click any card to see its overview and progress.

steps.label: Open the Gold Standard
steps.description: Navigate to 'Tool-Budget Robustness Benchmark' — the most detailed demo with 12 VC steps, 10 VR steps, 20 artifacts, and 12 references.

steps.label: Try the Execution Panel
steps.description: Expand a VC or VR step to see its prompt_hint, prompt_expanded, deliverables, and acceptance criteria.

steps.label: Check the Timeline
steps.description: Open the milestone panel to see deadline-driven tracking. Drag milestones between Kanban columns.

steps.label: Browse Literature
steps.description: View imported papers with tags. Filter by tag, search by title, or import new papers via CSV.

items.description: Implementation-focused steps — code, tests, infrastructure, packaging. Organized into 6 phases from setup to release.
Research-focused steps — literature review, experimental design, analysis, writing. Organized into 6 phases from positioning to camera-ready.
Steps are grouped into phases 0-5: Setup, Data/Schema, Core Implementation, Baselines, Experiments, Packaging/Writing.
A structured project specification that auto-generates execution steps, milestones, and artifacts when imported.
Red/Amber/Green health indicator per project based on blocked items, overdue milestones, and progress.

items.text: Open the Gold Standard project and read its structured overview
Expand a VC step and read the prompt_expanded field
Change a step status from todo to doing
Open the timeline and review milestone deadlines
Import a paper into the literature panel
